steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The first sentence establishes a general claim: many mushroom species contain phenolic compounds (cinnamic acid and catechin). The second sentence then provides specific instances where Ferreira detected these same compounds in particular mushroom species (Agaricus blazei and Lentinus edodes). The text moves from a broad statement to concrete examples.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: For example, introduces a specific instance that illustrates a broad point — exactly what the second sentence does here. For this reason suggests cause-effect, while However and Nevertheless both signal contrast, and none fit a relationship where one sentence simply provides concrete examples of the other. The second sentence exemplifies the general claim from the first. That matches choice D — D is correct.
